message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "User" as User
participant "云平台(网关)" as Gateway
participant "云平台(统计服)" as Statistics

activate User
activate Gateway
activate Statistics

User -> Gateway : 1 监控预警次数
Gateway -> Statistics : 2 监控预警次数
Statistics --> Gateway : 3 返回次数
Gateway --> User : 4 (数据库=>五类预警)日/月数量

deactivate User
deactivate Gateway
deactivate Statistics

@enduml
